# REL-01 — required native libraries a linux-x64 release artifact MUST contain.
# Checked by scripts/check-native-manifest.sh against the publish directory: each entry is a PREFIX, so a
# soname tail (e.g. libavcodec.so.62.6.100) still matches. '#' comments and blank lines are ignored.
# Optional natives (NDI — licensing; ASIO — Windows-only) are intentionally NOT listed here.

# Decode (FFmpeg 8.1, staged as the fallback):
libavcodec.so
libavformat.so
libavutil.so
libswresample.so
libswscale.so

# Audio backends:
libportaudio.so.2
libminiaudio.so

# MIDI, subtitles, MMD physics (shipped features):
libportmidi.so.2
libass.so
libmmd_bullet.so
